summary:
Specification for Module 16: Nation Unlocks (The Gamification Layer).
Purpose: Drive retention and viral sharing by gating content behind community goals.
Core Mechanic:
- Global "Interaction Counter" (Total Likes + Comments).
- Tiers: Tier 1 (10k) unlocks Vatican; Tier 2 (50k) unlocks Texas.
- "Unlock Event": When counter hits target, a special "Summoning" event broadcasts to all users.
Zero-Cost Implementation:
- Uses Redis `INCR` for atomic global counter.
- No new DB cost.
